current.summary: Implementing struct field and integer const extraction in Go extractor; discovered import-stripping issue mid-implementation

activeWork.description: Go extractor enhancements for capmon capability monitor pipeline - adding struct field value extraction and integer const handling
activeWork.progress: Identified root cause: adding import without immediate usage in same Edit call allows goimports/gopls to strip the unused import before next edit applies. Need to revise approach to add import + usage in single Edit call.

blockers.issue: Go import stripping between Edit calls
blockers.description: Linter removes unused imports between sequential edits. Import and code using it must be added together in one call.

recentDecisions: Capmon pipeline phases 1-10 complete; work focused on extractor improvements
Targeting struct fields and integer const extraction as next extractor enhancements
Using single Edit call for import + usage to prevent linter stripping
nextSteps: Revise struct field extraction to add reflect import and usage in single Edit call
Test extractor against provider docs for accuracy
Commit phase 10 work once extractor tests pass

context.notes: Previous session completed capmon pipeline phases 1-10 (schema design, provider scanning, manifest generation, seed command implementation). Current session hit Go import issue during extractor enhancement. See learning block in session for pattern (import + code must be in same Edit, not split).
